title: Connect Boards column to show all projects
excerpt: When you add a ‘Connect Boards’ column, the list of boards to connect is a long list of all recently used boards. But it would be more helpful if there could be an option to see all boards with a check box to select whic…

posts.author: Caroline24 (Caroline Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: When you add a ‘Connect Boards’ column, the list of boards to connect is a long list of all recently used boards. But it would be more helpful if there could be an option to see all boards with a check box to select which ones you want to add. Very often the projects I want to add aren’t in the list and I have to type the name of the board to show it and select it. When you are adding several boards, this is more manual/time consuming.
